reviewed_insights: Per-run toolset restriction should remain a server-side intersection and preserve explicit deny-all semantics.
Task recovery must clear every stale claim field in one transaction rather than reporting a partial unblock as success.
Background delegation and transient UI disconnects must not transfer or destroy session ownership.
Provider setup tests should wait for the actual post-setup affordance rather than treating an earlier header as readiness proof.
Credential drift across cloned runtime profiles is a first-class rotation and diagnostics risk.
